title: Meeting Notes Taker
scenario: Take meeting notes for a team meeting. The meeting discussion should include 3 key points. The meeting notes should be formatted as a bullet-point list.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the meeting notes meet the constraints of being under 100 words and including a heading.
Check if the meeting notes include exactly 3 key points.
Check if the meeting notes are formatted as a bullet-point list.
